home.title: Book a viewing slot by date and 2-hour time blocks
home.summary: Each slot confirms up to 2 people. Extra bookings go to the waitlist. Classmates can jump the queue and get higher priority.
home.slotHint: A 4-hour simulator booking requires selecting two 2-hour slots.
home.name: Name
home.priorityLevels: You can choose Normal or Classmate when booking.
home.priorityHint: Classmates can jump the queue, and same priority is sorted by submission time.
home.calendarHint: Before going to the simulator center, check the "Booking calendar" to confirm your booking was successful.
home.duplicateSlotSingle: Duplicate booking detected for the slot:
home.duplicateSlotMultiple: Duplicate bookings detected for the slots:
home.cancelRestoreHint: If you cannot make the booking time, you can cancel it first. It can still be restored later, and the original ordering will remain unchanged.

rules.title: Booking rules
rules.slotRuleDesc: The day is split into 12 two-hour slots. Each slot confirms up to 2 people; extras join the waitlist.
rules.priorityRuleDesc: Classmates can jump the queue, and same priority is sorted by submission time.
rules.bookingRuleDesc: Enter a date, name, classmate status, and select one or more slots from the home page.
rules.stepOneDesc: Pick the date you want, then select one or more time slots.
rules.stepTwoTitle: Fill in your name and submit
rules.stepTwoDesc: Enter your real name and mark whether you are a classmate before submitting.
rules.stepThreeDesc: Teacher-specified comes first, then classmates, then normal bookings. Overflow bookings go to the waitlist.

calendar.title: View recent booked slots
calendar.canceledHint: If you cannot make it temporarily, you can cancel the booking first. It can still be restored later, and the original ordering will remain unchanged.

admin.title: Booking overview and export
admin.subcopy: Log in with an admin account to view and export data.
admin.bulkDeleteBody: This will delete the {count} selected bookings and cannot be undone.
admin.emptySearch: No bookings match the current search
admin.cleanupBody: This removes all bookings from yesterday and earlier and cannot be undone. It will not affect today or later.
